qa_pairs.question: What should I do if I have renewed my Alliance account with the wrong role?
qa_pairs.answer: If you have renewed your Alliance account with the wrong role, you should create a new role using your current information. You can do this by logging into CCDB, navigating to 'My Account' in the main menu, and selecting 'Apply for a new role'. Your sponsor will then receive an email to confirm this new role.

qa_pairs.question: What happens to an old Alliance account role if a user creates a new role after an incorrect renewal?
qa_pairs.answer: If a user creates a new role after incorrectly renewing their Alliance account with the wrong role, the old role will automatically expire and be deactivated on the morning of June 11, 2025, if it is not renewed.
